title_en: Legislature passes law removing mandatory Indigenous training requirement for professionals
title_fr: La législature adopte une loi supprimant l'obligation de formation autochtone pour les professionnels
description_en: The Regulated Professions Neutrality Act removes the Law Society's ability to mandate Indigenous cultural-competency training (The Path), which is tied to TRC Call to Action #27.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type
